zh.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sloute於大約1553年出生在英國英格蘭戴文斯拉普頓。她於1572年11月23日與Nicholas Norrishe在英國戴文易亞斯特 阿林頓結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1619年9月6日在英國英格蘭米德萊可享年67歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sloute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stout
meanings: nickname from Middle English stout ‘bold, daring, brave’ (Old French estolt, estout, Anglo-Norman French estut, estot, estout ‘bold, fierce, randy, stubborn’).

perhaps occasionally a nickname from Middle English st(o)ut ‘gnat, horse-fly’ (Old English stūt, Old Norse stútr ‘gnat’), possibly used for someone with a biting tongue or for a small, quick-moving person.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sloute was born about 1553, in Slapton, Devon, England, United Kingdom. She married Nicholas Norrishe on 23 November 1572, in East Allington, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 6 September 1619, in Middlesex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Slouteは約1553年にイギリスイギリスデボンスラプトンで生まれた。1572年11月23日にイギリスデボンエアスト アリントンでNicholas Norrisheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1619年9月6日にイギリスイギリスミッドレセックスで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sloute(은)는 대략 1553년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 슬라프턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1572년 11월 23일 영국 데폰 이스트 앨링턴에서 Nicholas Norrishe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1619년 9월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 미들레세스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Sloute родилась около 1553 г. в местности слаптон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Norrishe 23 ноября 1572 г. в местности эаст аллингтон, девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 6 сентября 1619 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.
